label: Strategy Classification
description: Classifies a vendor or product strategic approach or market positioning

label: Viability Prediction
description: An analyst or author prediction about whether a product/company/technology will succeed

label: Actual Outcome
description: A documented real-world outcome for a prediction or assessment; verified via research

label: Technology Assessment
description: An evaluation of a technology's capabilities features or fit for purpose

label: Benchmark Result
description: A quantitative performance or comparison measurement

label: Framework Factor
description: A component element of a structured analytical framework

label: Market Data
description: A quantitative or qualitative data point about market size share or dynamics

label: Expert Opinion
description: An analyst or author qualitative judgment or assessment not tied to a specific framework
